trading.description: Solana trading, price analysis, and leveraged positions

plugins.name: trader
plugins.description: Solana trading agent — open/close leveraged perpetual positions and spot swap SOL/USDC via Jupiter

skills.name: jupiter-cli
skills.description: Execute trades, check balances, manage perpetual positions, fetch price data on Solana.

plugins.name: price
plugins.description: Solana price analysis — real-time Pyth prices, RSI/MACD/Bollinger signals, pivot-point levels, Fear & Greed sentiment, CoinGecko history

skills.name: price-cli
skills.description: Fetch real-time prices from Pyth, analyze movements, run RSI/MACD/Bollinger/EMA signals, compute pivot-point S/R levels, detect swing highs/lows, fetch Fear & Greed sentiment.

orchestration.name: sol-perps
orchestration.description: SOL leveraged perpetuals on Jupiter. Uses local highs/lows, trend structure, and tiered take-profit. Default 5x leverage.

orchestration.name: sol-swap
orchestration.description: Simple SOL/USDC dip-and-high swapper. Checks last 1h price history. Max budget 5 USDC, 2 USDC per entry. Staggered entries on deeper dips/highs. Logs swaps to swap-ledger.jsonl.

content.description: Media creation — audio transcription, image generation, video production, translation

plugins.name: elevenlabs
plugins.description: ElevenLabs speech — batch transcribe audio files (STT), convert text to audio (TTS), and speak text aloud

skills.name: stt
skills.description: Transcribe a directory of audio files to individual .txt files, then combine them into one.

skills.name: tts
skills.description: Convert a directory of .txt files to audio using ElevenLabs TTS.

skills.name: speak
skills.description: Speak text aloud using ElevenLabs voice AI and play it immediately.

plugins.name: replicate
plugins.description: Replicate AI media — generate images (seedream, banana) and create videos from images (wan-video)

skills.name: seedream
skills.description: Generate images from .txt prompts using bytedance/seedream-5-lite. DEFAULT model — $0.035/image. Supports Urdu/Arabic text, infographics, photorealistic.

skills.name: banana
skills.description: Generate images from .txt prompts using google/nano-banana-pro. LEGACY — prefer seedream for new work.

skills.name: video
skills.description: Generate .mp4 video from images + prompts using wan-video/wan-2.2-i2v-fast.

orchestration.name: transcribe
orchestration.description: Transcribe audio files to text. Directory of audio → individual .txt → combined transcript.txt.

orchestration.name: translate
orchestration.description: Translate text to another language (default: Urdu). Keeps English technical terms. Optimized for TTS output.

orchestration.name: generate-images
orchestration.description: Generate images from .txt prompt files. Default model: seedream ($0.035/img). Supports infographics, illustrations, photorealistic.

orchestration.name: generate-video
orchestration.description: Generate short .mp4 videos from images + prompt .txt files using wan-video on Replicate.

orchestration.name: narrate
orchestration.description: Convert text to speech audio using ElevenLabs TTS. Default voice: Achar, model: eleven_multilingual_v2.

orchestration.name: content-creator
orchestration.description: Full content pipeline chaining modular skills: transcribe → story → translate → generate-images → generate-video → narrate.

travel.description: Flight search, accommodation booking, and trip planning via browser automation

orchestration.name: flight-search
orchestration.description: Search Google Flights for cheap flights between cities. Opens browser, fills origin/destination/dates, reads results.

orchestration.name: airbnb-search
orchestration.description: Search Airbnb for best value-for-money entire homes/apartments. Compares price, rating, amenities. No single rooms.

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via playwright-cli — navigate, click, fill forms, take screenshots, manage sessions

skills.name: browse
skills.description: Automate any website — open, click, fill, screenshot. Ref-based snapshots, persistent cookies.

orchestration.name: playwright-cli
orchestration.description: Browser UI automation — navigate, click, fill forms, read text, take screenshots. UI only, no APIs or JS.

orchestration.name: usage
orchestration.description: Show plugin and skill usage stats — total calls, tokens, and cost estimates from the PostToolUse hook log.
